{{CargoRelic
|name=Violet-Gold Fox Marten
|class_id=20439
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This most beloved pet of Virupaksa. It can store electricity in its cheek and manipulate it freely. Moreover, the creature is also very agile, adept at biting, high-voltage strike, Five Lightnings, and other abilities. Trained by Virupaksa, it was once formidable. Up to the moment it is defeated, it kept touting itself as a guaranteed genuine Violet-Gold Fox Marten...
|fame=30
|art=17
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +6m
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +12m
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m<br> (Awakened)
}}
